initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(s.id) 
   FROM superhero s 
   JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
   WHERE s.weight_kg IS NULL AND c.id = (SELECT id FROM colour WHERE id IN ('blue', 'no eye color') LIMIT 1)
  ) - 
  (SELECT COUNT(s.id) 
   FROM superhero s 
   JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
   WHERE s.weight_kg IS NULL AND c.id = (SELECT id FROM colour WHERE id IN ('blue', 'no eye color') LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1)
  ) AS difference

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(s.id) 
     FROM superhero s 
     JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
     WHERE s.weight_kg IS NULL AND c.id = 'blue') 
    - 
    (SELECT COUNT(s.id) 
     FROM superhero s 
     JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
     WHERE s.weight_kg IS NULL AND c.id = 'no eye color') AS difference

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN c1.id = 'blue' THEN s.id END) AS blue_eyes_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN c2.id = 'no eye color' THEN s.id END) AS no_eye_color_count
FROM superhero s
LEFT JOIN colour c1 ON s.eye_colour_id = c1.id
LEFT JOIN colour c2 ON s.eye_colour_id = c2.id
WHERE s.weight_kg IS NULL;

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(s.id) 
     FROM superhero s 
     JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
     WHERE s.weight_kg IS NULL AND c.id = 'blue') 
    - 
    (SELECT COUNT(s.id) 
     FROM superhero s 
     JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
     WHERE s.weight_kg IS NULL AND c.id = 'no eye color') AS difference

SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(s.id) 
   FROM superhero s 
   JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
   WHERE s.weight_kg IS NULL AND c.id = 'blue') 
  - 
  (SELECT COUNT(s.id) 
   FROM superhero s 
   JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
   WHERE s.weight_kg IS NULL AND c.id = 'no eye color') AS difference

SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(s.id) 
   FROM superhero s 
   JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
   WHERE s.weight_kg IS NULL AND c.id = 'blue') 
  - 
  (SELECT COUNT(s.id) 
   FROM superhero s 
   JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
   WHERE s.weight_kg IS NULL AND c.id = 'no eye color') AS difference

candidates.sql:
SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.id = 'blue' THEN 1 END) - 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.id = 'no eye color' THEN 1 END) AS difference
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
WHERE s.weight_kg IS NULL
  AND c.id IN ('blue', 'no eye color');

SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.id = 'blue' THEN 1 END) - 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.id = 'no eye color' THEN 1 END) AS difference
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
WHERE s.weight_kg IS NULL
  AND c.id IN ('blue', 'no eye color');

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN c.id = 'blue' THEN 1 END) AS blue_eyes_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN c.id = 'no eye color' THEN 1 END) AS no_eye_color_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN c.id = 'blue' THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN c.id = 'no eye color' THEN 1 END) AS difference
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
WHERE s.weight_kg IS NULL;
